cityDNA.coreFantasy: A lich-undead limestone undercity where black-market signals, ancestor vaults, archive towers, containment keeps, alchemical labs, and a reliquary crown tower make preservation political.
cityDNA.readerTakeaway: Oss Veyr is not a generic undead dungeon; the uploaded images show a formal necromantic city of records, debt, custody, preservation, and ritualized undercity authority.
cityDNA.civilizationThesis: Oss Veyr treats memory, custody, black-market leverage, and necromantic preservation as civic infrastructure.
cityDNA.visualIdentity: Limestone blocks, black marble, bone-white ceremony, silver inlay, arcane glow, subterranean foundations, archive towers, reliquary spires, ancestor masks, containment yards, and blue alchemical lamps.
cityDNA.culturalIdentity: Lich-undead civic culture where preservation, records, debt, custody, and formula control replace ordinary civic warmth.
cityDNA.symbolicIdentity: Reliquaries, quiet crowns, ancestor masks, bone lantern paths, mist veils, gold seals, black-market vaults, blue lamps, and formula archives symbolize public memory under control.

canonLocks: Oss Veyr is a mature lich-undead civic undercity, not a generic necromantic dungeon.
The Wonder is Lich Reliquary Tower of the Quiet Crown.
The Beacon is Black Market Arcade Beacon.
The Seat of Power is Bone White Ceremony Veiled High Court.
The five primary districts are Underworld / Hidden Economy, Necropolis / Ancestor Quarter, Records / Archives, Prison / Containment, and Arcane / Alchemical Labs.

The uploaded district anchors include Underworld / Hidden Economy Civic Hall, Black Market Arcade Beacon, Mist Veils Monument, Understreet Vault Nook, Necropolis / Ancestor Quarter Civic Hall, Ancestor Vault, Ancestor Masks Monument, Bone Lantern Path Nook, Records / Archives Hall, Archive Tower, Records Archives Gold-Seal Monument, Copyist Hall Nook, Prison / Containment Civic Hall, Containment Keep, Judgment Yard Nook, Arcane / Alchemical Labs Civic Hall, Alchemy Lab, Blue-Lamp Monument, and Formula Archive Nook.
provisionalCanon: Oss Veyr's highest civic virtue is preservation.
The contact-sheet pass confirms a formal, pale, undercity read rather than loose horror scenery.
rejectedReads: lich city as only evil necromancy
necropolis divorced from records, debt, containment, and alchemy
cautionFlags: Keep civic order visible inside the horror language.
Black-market beacon identity must remain central, not an incidental crime detail.

environment.environmentalLogic: The images show an undercity where dry stone, vaults, lightless streets, and ritual basins make memory, debt, and custody spatially legible.

forms: Lich Reliquary Tower of the Quiet Crown
Bone White Ceremony Veiled High Court
skyline: Lich Reliquary Tower of the Quiet Crown as wonder anchor
Bone White Ceremony Veiled High Court as seat of power
Black Market Arcade Beacon as signal landmark
archive towers, ancestor vaults, containment keeps, and alchemy labs layered through limestone undercity streets

civilization.people: Citizens are lich-undead and necromantic functionaries whose public life centers on custody of memory, bodies, records, formulas, and obligations.
civilization.governance: The Bone White Ceremony Veiled High Court governs preservation, debt, custody, records, containment, and restricted formula work.
civilization.religion: Funerary wards, ancestor masks, bone lanterns, reliquaries, and quiet-crown rites make death an administrative and sacred continuum.

streets.appearance: Pale, dry, formal, and cold: black-market arcades, ancestor vaults, archive towers, containment yards, alchemy labs, blue lamps, and bone-white courts line undercity streets.
streets.movement: Movement follows vault passages, necropolis paths, archive stairs, warded yards, and laboratory approaches.
streets.lighting: Arcane blue and bone-white light replace ordinary warmth.
streets.weatherEffects: External weather is muted; internal chill, dust, and ward shimmer define atmosphere.
streets.dayCycle: Cycles follow court, archive, vault, containment, and lab procedures rather than sunlight.
streets.nightCycle: Night deepens black-market activity and reliquary glow while archives stay coldly lit.

housing.wealthy: Court and reliquary-adjacent residences of black marble, silver inlay, sealed rooms, and private vault access.
housing.middle: Archive, lab, and vault-worker quarters with lamp niches and record storage.
housing.poor: Cold undercity rooms near service corridors, vault shadows, and containment approaches.

districts.name: Underworld / Hidden Economy
districts.civicPurpose: Debt, contraband, hidden storage, black-market signaling, and unofficial survival under court control.
districts.visualIdentity: Underworld / Hidden Economy Civic Hall, Black Market Arcade Beacon, Mist Veils Monument, Understreet Vault Nook.

districts.name: Necropolis / Ancestor Quarter
districts.civicPurpose: Ancestor memory, funerary preservation, and death-care institution.
districts.visualIdentity: Necropolis / Ancestor Quarter Civic Hall, Ancestor Vault, Ancestor Masks Monument, Bone Lantern Path Nook.

districts.name: Records / Archives
districts.civicPurpose: Official memory, public record, copied truth, and legal preservation.
districts.visualIdentity: Records / Archives Hall, Archive Tower, Records Archives Gold-Seal Monument, Copyist Hall Nook.

districts.name: Prison / Containment
districts.civicPurpose: Custody, judgment, warded danger management, and consequence.
districts.visualIdentity: Prison / Containment Civic Hall, Containment Keep, Mist Veils Monument, Judgment Yard Nook.

districts.name: Arcane / Alchemical Labs
districts.civicPurpose: Formula control, alchemical preservation, and restricted experimental authority.
districts.visualIdentity: Arcane / Alchemical Labs Civic Hall, Alchemy Lab, Blue-Lamp Monument, Formula Archive Nook.

wonder.name: Lich Reliquary Tower of the Quiet Crown
wonder.symbolicRole: Preserved authority and deathless memory made monumental.
wonder.visualRole: Reliquary tower of limestone, black marble, silver inlay, and arcane glow rising over the undercity.
wonder.civicRole: Citywide symbol for preservation, ceremony, memory, and quiet crown legitimacy.
storyHooks: The Quiet Crown remembers a ruler the court has erased.

beacon.name: Black Market Arcade Beacon
beacon.symbolicRole: Public signal emerging from hidden economy.
beacon.visualRole: Beacon-compatible black-market landmark with mist veils, vault doors, and arcane warning light.
beacon.civicRole: Coordinates unofficial routes, debt networks, and public danger signals.
storyHooks: A Beacon change reveals which hidden debts hold the city together.

seatOfPower.name: Bone White Ceremony Veiled High Court
seatOfPower.symbolicRole: Funerary law, preservation, and veiled authority.
seatOfPower.visualRole: Bone-white high court with sealed archives, command platforms, and ceremonial approaches.
seatOfPower.civicRole: Handles rulings, preservation petitions, custody reviews, and formula permissions.
storyHooks: The High Court decides whether a memory may legally continue.

majorLandmarks.name: Ancestor Vault
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Vaults, ancestor masks, bone lantern paths, and cold stone.
storyHooks: An ancestor mask identifies the wrong living heir.

majorLandmarks.name: Archive Tower
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Archive tower with gold seals, copyist hall, and vault stairs.
majorLandmarks.civicRole: Records, legal memory, and copied truth.
storyHooks: A copyist hall preserves the version no reliquary will speak.

majorLandmarks.name: Containment Keep
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Warded keep with mist veils, judgment yard, cell blocks, and warning bells.
storyHooks: The Judgment Yard proves containment began as mercy.

majorLandmarks.name: Alchemy Lab
majorLandmarks.visualRole: Lab with blue lamps, formula archive, retorts, sealed jars, and arcane glow.
storyHooks: A formula archive explains why the city fears decay more than death.

S2: Necropolis / Ancestor Quarter Civic Hall, Ancestor Vault, Ancestor Masks Monument, Bone Lantern Path Nook.

S4: Prison / Containment Civic Hall, Containment Keep, Mist Veils Monument, Judgment Yard Nook.

mapBackgroundGuidance: Keep Lich Reliquary Tower of the Quiet Crown, Black Market Arcade Beacon, and Bone White Ceremony Veiled High Court legible together.
Use limestone, black marble, bone-white ceremony, arcane blue glow, ancestor vaults, archive towers, containment yards, and alchemical labs.
requiredVisualElements: Lich Reliquary Tower of the Quiet Crown
Bone White Ceremony Veiled High Court
elementsToAvoid: pure evil necromancy without civic systems
archives and containment hidden from city identity
